title: Aksu's Peaceful Gameplay Pack
description: Aksu's Peaceful Gameplay Pack transforms your Minecraft experience into a serene and harmonious adventure.
body:
# **_Aksu's Peaceful Gameplay Pack_**

Please select version 1.0.2 for a stable gameplay.

Alpha 0.55.x versions are bleeding edge and buggy, also may occasionally crash. They are not recommended.

## About version 1.0.2

This modpack enhances gameplay by integrating various mods that improve visual aesthetics, optimize performance, and expand gameplay mechanics. Experience enriched farming and cooking with Farmer's Delight, enjoy dynamic lighting through LambDynamicLights, and benefit from performance boosts provided by Sodium and FerriteCore. Additionally, mods like Clumps streamline experience collection, while 3D Skin Layers adds depth to character appearances. Together, these and other carefully selected mods create a more immersive and efficient adventure. Whether you're crafting intricate structures or exploring serene landscapes, Aksu's Peaceful Gameplay Pack creates the perfect environment for a calm and enjoyable Minecraft journey.


## About version 1.0.0

This modpack delivers a seamlessly optimized and tranquil Minecraft experience, perfect for players who cherish building, exploration, and relaxation. This pack integrates performance-enhancing mods like Lithium and Sodium, alongside visual and auditory enhancements such as AmbientSounds and LambDynamicLights, ensuring smooth and immersive gameplay. Enjoy streamlined interactions with tools like Tree Harvester and Just Enough Items, while navigational ease is provided by Xaero's Minimap and World Map. Privacy is prioritized with mods like No Telemetry and No Chat Reports, and customization options abound with 3D Skin Layers and Simple Voice Chat. Additionally, experience a harmonious world free from combat through Vegan Hostile Mob Drops and No XP Anvils. Whether you're crafting intricate structures or exploring serene landscapes, Aksu's Peaceful Gameplay Pack creates the perfect environment for a calm and enjoyable Minecraft journey.

## How to Play (Version 1.0.1 and newer)

First: **Start the Game**
 - Launch the game and click on **"Single Player"**.
 - Set the difficulty to **Peaceful Mode**. (Optional)
 - Select **"Create New World"**.

Second: **Enjoy the Game**
 - Relax and focus on building, exploring, etc.
 - Change few settings for you liking
 - Enjoy the game!
## How to Play (Version 1.0.0)

First: **Start the Game**
 - Launch the game and click on **"Single Player"**.
 - Set the difficulty to **Peaceful Mode**.
 - Select **"Create New World"**.

Second: **Confirm Peaceful Mode**
 - In the settings, ensure **"Peaceful"** difficulty is selected.
 - Click the lock icon and confirm by pressing **"Yes"**.

Third: **Enjoy the Game**
 - Relax and focus on building, exploring, etc.
 - Change few settings for you liking
 - Enjoy the game!

## About alpha 0.55.x versions

0.55.x are "forever alpha" development versions of modpack. Alpha 0.55.x versions are up-to-date and buggy, also may occasionally updated actively than the beta and release versions


## How to Play (Alpha 0.55.x versions)

Playing alpha 0.55.x versions is not recommended, try at your own risk.

First: **Start the Game**
 - Launch the game and click on **"Single Player"**.
 - Set the difficulty to **Peaceful Mode**. (Optional)
 - Select **"Create New World"**.

Second: **Enjoy the Game**
 - Relax and focus on building, exploring, etc.
 - Change few settings for you liking
 - Enjoy the game!
